Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates cytosine 38 in the anticodon loop of tRNA(Asp). Can also methylate cytosine 38 in tRNA(Glu), albeit to a lower level, but not tRNA(Lys). Pmt1-dependent tRNA methylation is induced by nitrogen limitation and depends on the nutrient-sensing protein kinase sck2. Does not have DNA-methylation activity. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:23074192}.
